judgment.summary: The business features high revenue growth, exceptional gross margins, and robust free cash flow generation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.97 was in line with the 0.97 estimate; next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: PEG ratio 0.92 — suggests the business is undervalued relative to its growth.
Revenue growth 22.1% — indicates strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin 76.6% — demonstrates high-quality software economics.
Free cash flow (TTM) $5.11B — provides significant liquidity relative to $2.43B in total debt.
Forward P/E 18.92 vs trailing 56.59 — implies significant expected earnings expansion.
negatives: Current ratio 0.84 — suggests potential short-term liquidity pressure.
Quick ratio 0.69 — indicates limited ability to cover immediate liabilities with liquid assets.
Earnings growth 2.3% — shows a significant lag compared to 22.1% revenue growth.
